_meta.description: DATED, hand-curated advisory data. deskscanner NEVER asserts a CVE from memory. It reports (a) 'outdated major version' purely from version-number comparison against the dated 'latest_major' snapshot below, and (b) named advisories ONLY if they appear in the 'advisories' list here, with a citation. Any package not covered is reported as 'not scanned for known CVEs'.
